name: release
describe: Version bump + changelog + release PR (prepare), or tag + publish + GH release (finalize). No agent.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.describe: `prepare` (default): bump + changelog + release PR. `finalize`: E2E gate + tag + publish + GH release.

inputs.name: bump
inputs.describe: Version bump when mode=prepare (ignored in finalize). Default patch.

inputs.name: dry-run
inputs.describe: Print plan without writing files, creating PRs, tagging, or publishing.

inputs.name: issue
inputs.describe: Issue number to post success/failure follow-up on. Auto-populated by dispatch when triggered via @kody comment.

inputs.name: prefer
inputs.describe: On release/vX.Y.Z branch collision (prepare mode): 'ours' force-pushes over the remote branch; 'theirs' reuses the existing branch and its open PR. Default (unset): refuse on non-ff.
